title: Performance database
doc_html:
NOTE: §583 eff. if and when a deposit is made into the Louisiana Transparency Fund. See Acts 2023, No. 446.

§583. Performance database

            A. The auditor shall ensure that the website includes a performance database that is electronically searchable by the public.

            B. The executive branch shall provide information pursuant to this Section.

            C. The performance database shall include the Louisiana Performance Accountability System, the electronic performance database that tracks performance standards, interim quarterly performance targets, and actual performance information for executive branch departments and agencies required under the Louisiana Government Performance and Accountability Act, R.S. 39:87.1 et seq.

            Acts 2023, No. 446, §1, see Act.
doc_text:
NOTE:  §583 eff. if and when a deposit is made into the Louisiana Transparency Fund. See
Acts 2023, No. 446.
§583.  Performance database
A.  The auditor shall ensure that the website includes a performance database that
is electronically searchable by the public.
B.  The executive branch shall provide information pursuant to this Section.
C.  The performance database shall include the Louisiana Performance
Accountability System, the electronic performance database that tracks performance
standards, interim quarterly performance targets, and actual performance information for
executive branch departments and agencies required under the Louisiana Government
Performance and Accountability Act, R.S. 39:87.1 et seq.
Acts 2023, No. 446, §1, see Act.
